expertAssessments.rationale: Vision image attachment routing, native multimodal execution, and standard five-question AI smoke were covered on production Cloud Run.
GitLab release pipeline, Vercel version endpoint, Cloud Run health, and post-deploy smoke all reached v8.11.184.
The direct Vercel JSON API correctly rejected unauthenticated access with 401, so the image attachment end-to-end UI upload path was not covered in this targeted run.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add or document a CSRF-safe authenticated Playwright UI flow for image attachment upload when the frontend exposes that control.

notes: Main validate pipeline 2536946848 succeeded for fix commit 20e4fce43.
Release tag pipeline 2536955714 succeeded for v8.11.184.
Vercel Playwright MCP rendered production / and /api/version returned v8.11.184.

Cloud Run production Vision smoke used reports/qa/evidence/qa-20260519-v811181-analyze-server-cache-hit-pass.png as real image input and returned finalAgent=Vision Agent, provider=gemini, modeSelectionSource=vision_input, responseChars=759.
Unauthenticated Vercel /api/ai/supervisor direct JSON smoke returned 401 as expected; UI-authenticated image upload path was intentionally skipped in this targeted run.
Standard five conversational AI questions passed after one transient 500 on question 4 was retried twice successfully.
